name: Finnish Curd Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Coat the baking dish, pie pan, or springform pan generously with butter.
3. Sprinkle the bread crumbs into the pan and shake the pan gently to distribute them along the sides as well. The crumbs should completely coat the inside of the pan.
4. Chill briefly to set the crumbs.
5. In a large mixing bowl, press the cottage cheese through a sieve.
6. Beat the eggs and sugar until frothy.
7. Add the spices (cinnamon, cardamom, ginger), orange rind, and lemon rind to the eggs and sugar mixture.
8. Add the cottage cheese and blend all ingredients well.
9. Stir in the melted butter.
10. Add the dry mixture (flour and baking powder) and mix thoroughly.
11. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
12. Bake for 1 hour.
Note: This recipe can vary depending on the type of pan used. The cake is more like a quick bread and can be sweetened further if desired, as it is not particularly sweet.
